violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed to date shellfish tags when finished. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the second 2-Door Reach-in refrigerator. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2025
